description: Add activity GIC calculated Mvar Qloss in scaled manner to the working case to arrive at the converged power flow solution. ierr = gic_pf(addfile, qpct=100, method=’last’, tap=None, area=None, phshift=None, dctap=None, swsh=None, flat=None, varlimit=None, nondiv=None, pfprogress=0)
python_syntax: ierr = gic_pf(addfile, qpct=100, method=’last’, tap=None, area=None, phshift=None, dctap=None, swsh=None, flat=None, varlimit=None, nondiv=None, pfprogress=0)

parameters.name: addfile
parameters.description: RDCH raw file created by GIC activity that represents Constant Current Mvar losses due to GMD corresponding to the working case, no default allowed
